skills.name: Game Physics
skills.notes: Game physics involves the simulation of physical systems in video games, such as rigid body dynamics, collision detection, and fluid mechanics. It creates realistic interactions between game objects.

skills.name: Linear Algebra
skills.notes: A fundamental branch of mathematics used extensively involving vectors, matrices, and linear transformations to position, move, and rotate objects in 2D and 3D space.

skills.name: Computer Graphics
skills.notes: Concepts for rendering images, managing the graphics pipeline, dealing with shaders, lighting models, and reflections.
